title: error object payload fields
manager: Populate the error object with the forensic fields that make a failure diagnosable without a debugger: the state stack trace, the data snapshot at the moment of error, the input-tape position and output tape, the start/stop/halt state, the target action, and human labels. Each field is the difference between 'it threw' and 'it threw HERE, holding THIS, trying to do THAT'.
cs: folds fsl#749 (output tape), #748 (input-tape position), #747 (start/stop/halt state), #745 (data at error), #744 (target action), #404 (labels in errors)
